allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Name -like '*postgre*' -or $_.DisplayName -like '*postgre*'} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -like '*postgre*' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Format-Table" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD ''postgres'';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -d servicetickets -c "SELECT * FROM maschinentyp ORDER BY name;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS servicetickets;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "CREATE DATABASE servicetickets ENCODING ''UTF8'' LC_COLLATE ''German_Germany.1252'' LC_CTYPE ''German_Germany.1252'' TEMPLATE template0;")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const {Pool} = require\(''pg''\); const p = new Pool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||''localhost'',port:process.env.DB_PORT||5432,database:process.env.DB_NAME||''servicetickets'',user:process.env.DB_USER||''postgres'',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD}\); p.query\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users''\).then\(r=>console.log\(''users:'',r.rows[0].count\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''Error:'',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -U postgres -d servicetickets -c "SELECT r.name, r.label, COUNT\(rp.permission_id\) AS permissions FROM roles r LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = r.role_id GROUP BY r.role_id, r.name, r.label ORDER BY r.role_id;")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -ano 2^>nul ^| findstr LISTENING ^| findstr :3001'\) do @echo PID=%a && taskkill /F /PID %a" 2>&1)
Bash(cmd.exe /c "wmic process where \\"name='bash.exe' OR name='sh.exe'\\" get ProcessId,CommandLine" 2>&1)
